title: gladiolus plicatus
intro: Gladiolus plicatus, also known as the pleated sword lily or gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Gladiolus plicatus include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
